channel.title: Azure Storage Mover on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Storage Mover on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Azure Storage Mover now supports migration from Google Cloud Storage (GCS)
item.description:
Azure Storage Mover Public Preview now supports cloud-to-cloud migration from Google Cloud Storage (GCS) to Azure Blob Storage. Migration uses the S3-compatible interface.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Storage Mover Blob-to-Blob migration
item.description:
Azure Storage Mover is now generally available for Blob container-to-Blob container migrations. It supports moving data across regions, subscriptions, and accounts through a fully managed service.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Schedule one-time or recurring migrations with Azure Storage Mover
item.description:
Azure Storage Mover now includes built-in job scheduling for migrations. Users can configure one-time or recurring jobs to start automatically at a specified date and time.

  • Source: Azure Updates
